case_title: JIRDE, MOHAMMED DBA A&J BEAUTY SUPPLY VS BARNES, RICHARD et al

CERTIFIED MAIL TO AGENT, US SOCIAL SECURITY ADMIN. RETURNED SIGNED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIRDE, MOHAMMED DBA A&J BEAUTY SUPPLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARNES, RICHARD U.S.SOCIAL SECURITY ADMIN.DEPT.OF TREASURY FINANCI DEFT.
